en: This is the story of the day my life ended.
ko: 이건 내 인생이 끝나는 날 이야기야.

en: I'm kidding. It was the happiest day of my life. Our wedding day.
ko: 농담이야. 내 인생에서 가장 행복한 날이었어. 우리 결혼식 날.

en: The biggest shindig to hit the kingdom in forever.
Everyone dying to catch a glimpse of me. Us. I meant us.
ko: 모두 나를... 아니 우리를 보려고 안달이었어.

en: Everything was perfect. Just like I always dreamed it would be.
ko: 모든 게 완벽했어. 내가 항상 꿈꾸던 대로.

en: Yeah. Everything was perfect. Oh, come on!
ko: 그래. 모든 게 완벽했어. 아, 제발!

en: They still can't get my nose right. It was a magical day.
ko: 아직도 내 코를 못 그리네. 마법 같은 날이었어.

en: And everything went just as we planned.
Well... Almost.
Wow. Wow.
Wow. Wow. Wow.
Dearly beloved, we are gathered here today to celebrate the joining of Rapunzel's and
Eugene's in marriage.
To live their lives together as husband and wife in everlasting peace.
ko: 부부로서 영원한 평화 속에 함께 살아가기를.

en: May I have the rings?
Those were my grandmother's wedding rings!
The kingdom is lost!
And the mutual respect which they bring to their life together
had their roots in the love and friendship and guidance you have given them.
ko: 사랑과 우정과 여러분이 준 가르침에 뿌리를 두고 있습니다.

en: Look at this!
Ah!
Held in reverence. Dignity, honor, respect.
Frying pans! Commandant of frying pans here! Fire!
Fire! That's the signal!
Release the doves! There's the doves. Release the lanterns!
ko: 비둘기 날려! 비둘기 나간다. 등불 날려!

en: Release the lanterns!
Fire!
Fire! In everlasting peace, may I have the rings?
ko: 발사! 영원한 평화 속에, 반지를 주시겠습니까?

en: I... I now pronounce you husband and wife.
You may kiss.
Happy birthday!
So, who wants a piece of cake?
Happy birthday!
